## filterBlacklistedModules() function

Creates a [Wire](./x-components.wire.md) that is only executed if the event is emitted from a [XModule](./x-components.xmodule.md) that is NOT included in the `blacklist` array passed as parameter.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare function filterBlacklistedModules<Payload>(wire: Wire<Payload>, blacklist: Array<XModuleName | null>): Wire<Payload>;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  wire | [Wire](./x-components.wire.md)<!-- -->&lt;Payload&gt; | The wire to filter using the whitelist. |
|  blacklist | Array&lt;[XModuleName](./x-components.xmodulename.md) \| null&gt; | An array of [XModuleName](./x-components.xmodulename.md) or null. |

<b>Returns:</b>

[Wire](./x-components.wire.md)<!-- -->&lt;Payload&gt;

The Wire function with blacklisted modules filter.
